nasb.text: The wicked will see it and be vexed, He will gnash his teeth and melt away; The desire of the wicked will perish.

esv.text: The wicked man sees it and is angry; he gnashes his teeth and melts away; the desire of the wicked will perish!

cnv.text: 惡人看見就惱怒， 他必咬牙切齒，身心耗損； 惡人的心願必幻滅。

ccb.text: 恶人见状，必然恼怒， 咬牙切齿，气绝身亡。 恶人的盼望必破灭。

csbs.text: 恶人看见就恼怒， 他们咬牙切齿终必消逝； 他们的愿望也要消亡。
